info.title: Unheft
info.description: Strigops Unheft — EF Core Migration Designer File Consolidation Tool

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: unheft — EF Core Migration Designer File Consolidation Tool

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Preview changes without modifying any files

options.name: --validate
options.description: Validate that consolidation is semantically lossless by comparing generated SQL before and after

options.name: --project
options.description: Path to the target project (.csproj) containing the migrations

options.name: --startup-project
options.description: Path to the startup project (.csproj) used as the runtime host

options.name: --context
options.description: The DbContext class name to use

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: Path to the directory containing EF Core migrations [default: <path>]
